Overview
Welcome to the game provided by Shanghai Aileyou Network Technology Co., Ltd. (hereinafter "we"). This User Agreement ("this Agreement") is a legal agreement between users (meaning any individual who intends to accept, or has actually accepted, the products and services we provide, hereinafter "user") and Shanghai Aileyou Network Technology Co., Ltd. Please therefore read this Agreement carefully before registering as our user or accepting our products and services.

Special note:
Since some clauses may cause inconvenience or loss to users in certain circumstances, please read carefully the clauses containing words such as "liability", "disclaimer", "defense", or "objection", and complete registration or actual acceptance of our products and services only once you understand their meaning.
Due to changes in users, market conditions, or business operations, we reserve the right to amend this Agreement and related service rules from time to time; if a business feature change occurs, we will separately notify you by updating this Agreement, via pop-up, or similar means.
The user understands and agrees: clicking the "Agree" button to complete registration, or actually accepting our products and services, constitutes acceptance of all service rules under this Agreement and any necessary amendments made to it, and willingness to be bound by them. In the event of a dispute, the user may not raise as a defense that they did not read it carefully.
If you do not agree to this Agreement or to any amendment we make to it from time to time, you may voluntarily cancel or stop using our products and services; if you continue to use them, this is deemed acceptance of this Agreement and all amendments made to it and related service rules, and you may not raise an objection to this in the event of a dispute.
I. Statement of Rights
1. All intellectual property rights and other rights involved in the products and services we provide, including copyright, patent rights, trademark rights, and trade secrets, belong to us or our original licensors. Without authorization from us or our original licensors, no user may download, copy, transmit, adapt, or edit them without permission, or shall bear corresponding legal liability.

2. The "account" referred to in this Agreement means a lawful, valid account registered by the user. Users must register or use an account to accept the services we provide. We own the account and all data generated through the user's use of it (including but not limited to account passwords, characters, virtual currency, and virtual items), except for the user's personal data such as name, ID number, and phone number. In the normal course of accepting services under this Agreement, the user holds the right to use the account and the data within it, as set out in this Agreement.

II. Fee Policy
1. Where certain products or services require a fee, we will publish the fee schedule, purchase method, and other payment-related information prominently on the relevant product/service webpage. Users are obligated to read this carefully before purchase; once a user purchases a paid product or service, this indicates the user fully understands and accepts the corresponding fee method and schedule.
2. We have the right to determine and amend the fee schedule and collection method for our products and services, and may set different fee schedules and methods depending on the product or service. Users should purchase using the payment methods we provide; otherwise we reserve the right to refuse or stop providing that product or service.
3. We may, as needed, establish, add, or modify value-added services in the game and issue value-added service tokens. Such tokens are obtained by exchanging RMB; once RMB is exchanged for tokens, the RMB is deemed used, and the tokens cannot be exchanged back into RMB. The tokens are used to purchase usage rights to relevant game materials or to receive related value-added services.

III. Account Registration
1. Users must register an account to accept the services we provide. Ownership of account-related information (other than the user's own information) belongs to us; upon completing registration, the user obtains the right to use that account-related information.
2. Users must have corresponding capacity for conduct and liability; if the user is a minor, registration must be completed by, or in the presence of, their parent or guardian, who bears responsibility for actions and events occurring on the account used by the minor.
2. The user promises to register under their true identity and warrants that the personal identity information provided (including identification materials and other personal data) is true, complete, and valid, and bears corresponding legal liability for the information provided in accordance with law and the terms herein. Personal identification materials include the name and ID number and other information we require to verify the user's true identity. Users should update any other information if it changes, to keep it true, complete, and valid. Users bear the consequences of untrue registration information themselves; we bear no liability. Where we ask users to fill in account-protection or other account information and the user understands and agrees, failure to fill it in, or providing incorrect or false information, resulting in inability to verify the user's identity, entitles us to refuse the user's service request.
3. If the information provided by the user is inaccurate, untrue, or unlawful, the user bears the resulting consequences. Users should fully understand that ID information is the primary credential for account usage rights. Users who register using another person's ID number or a fabricated ID number will have no protection for their rights and interests in the game.
4. If a user's personal information at registration does not match the facts, we may stop providing products and services to them. When a user applies to us to query or modify certain account information, they must provide the relevant information record left at registration; if unable to provide fully correct records, or if the identity information provided does not match existing true identity information, we have the right to decline to recognize the account as belonging to the applicant and to refuse any request regarding that account.
5. Once a user's registration application succeeds, we will assign the user an account; once set, the account cannot be changed. The user enjoys rights and bears responsibility, in accordance with law and this Agreement and related service rules, for actions taken under the account after logging in.

IV. Account Use and Safekeeping
1. We have the right to review whether the identity information a user provides at registration is true and valid, and will actively take reasonable technical and managerial measures to keep user accounts secure and valid. Users are obligated to properly safeguard their account and password, and to use them correctly and securely; users may not transfer or lend their account or password, share an account with others, or disclose their account, password, or registration information to anyone. Any party who fails to fulfill these obligations, resulting in loss of the account/password or account theft that harms the civil rights of the user or others, shall bear the resulting legal liability.
2. If an account or password is leaked due to the user's own fault or a virus infection on the user's computer (including but not limited to trojans or hacking, for any reason), the user bears responsibility themselves. If a user loses their password, we reserve the right to charge an additional fee for the related service.
3. If a user discovers their account or password is being used illegally by someone else, or notices unusual usage, they should promptly notify us per our published procedures, and may request that we suspend that account's login and use.
4. Where we take measures to suspend a user's account login and use based on the user's notification, we will require the user to provide and verify personal valid identity information consistent with their registration information.
(A) If we verify that the valid identity information provided by the user matches the registered identity information, we will promptly take measures to suspend the account's login and use.
(B) If we breach paragraph (A) of this clause and fail to promptly suspend the account's login and use, causing loss to the user, we shall bear the corresponding legal liability.
(C) If the user fails to provide valid personal identification, or the identification provided does not match the registered identity information, we have the right to refuse the user's request above, and we bear no liability for any resulting loss.
(D) Where a user, in order to protect their lawful rights and interests, provides us with valid personal identity information matching their registered identity information, we shall provide the user with necessary assistance and support, such as proof of account registrant and original registration information, and provide relevant evidentiary materials to administrative or judicial authorities as needed.
(E) We may provide or recommend tools or services for protecting account passwords, whether paid or free. The user understands and agrees that such tools or services may improve account security to some extent, but we do not guarantee they ensure absolute account security. If an account is stolen after using such tools, provided we have fulfilled our safekeeping obligations, we bear no liability.

Users agree to bear legal liability for the content they publish or upload, and agree that we have the right to review user-uploaded content and take necessary action against violating content, including but not limited to blocking or removing user-uploaded information based on rights claims raised by third parties. Users hereby authorize us to use any content they upload free of charge.

VI. Interpretation of the Agreement and Standards of Judgment
1. We reserve final interpretive authority over the terms of this Agreement, and have the right to judge for ourselves, per the standards agreed herein, whether a user has violated this Agreement or related service rules, and to take corresponding measures to protect the rights of all parties.
2. This Agreement, related service rules, any amendments we make to them from time to time, and data stored in our server systems are the fundamental basis for judging user conduct.

VII. Changes, Suspension, and Termination of Service
1. If a user publishes unlawful information, seriously violates public morals, or engages in other conduct prohibited by law, we have the right to immediately terminate service to that user.
2. If a user engages in improper conduct while accepting our services, we have the right to terminate service to them. The specific circumstances of such improper conduct must be clearly agreed in this Agreement or be prohibited conduct we have expressly notified in advance as grounds for termination; otherwise we may not terminate service to the user.
3. If a user provides false registration identity information or engages in conduct violating this Agreement, we have the right to suspend all or part of our services to them; when taking suspension measures we shall notify the user of the suspension period, which shall be reasonable, and we shall promptly restore service to the user once the suspension period ends.
4. Where we suspend or terminate all or part of our service to a user under this clause, we bear the burden of proof.
5. Given the special nature of network services, the user agrees that we have the right, at our discretion, to unilaterally add, modify, remove, suspend, or terminate all or part of the services we provide, and will announce such decisions publicly (including but not limited to adding, suspending, or terminating the operation of a particular game). If we terminate operation of an online game, or if the operating rights to an online game are transferred, we shall give 60 days' advance notice by announcement.

IX. Risk Assumption and Disclaimer of Liability
1. Users understand and agree that the services we provide may be interrupted in whole or part, temporarily unusable, or delayed due to faults or malfunctions of network systems, software, or hardware belonging to us, our partners, or related telecom carriers, or due to operational errors by partner or telecom personnel, or due to unauthorized intrusion into or falsification of our systems, resulting in stoppage or interruption of service or loss of user data; users may not demand compensation from us as a result.
2. A user's use of our services may carry risk arising from causes other than us as the service provider, including but not limited to damage to the user's computer software/hardware, or loss of data, resulting from use of our services or from downloading games or materials/images from our website; we bear no liability for this.
3. Due to the special nature of network services, we bear no liability for program issues, or issues of stability, security, or accuracy, arising from the services we provide.
4. We bear no liability for any direct, indirect, or incidental damage or lost profit resulting from a user's use of, or inability to use, the service or network. Where liability cannot be fully excluded by law, our liability (whether based on breach of contract or tort) is limited to the amount the user has paid us for the product or service in question.

X. Damages
If a user violates the terms of service or applicable law, causing us, our affiliated companies, agents, trustees, or other related performance assistants to suffer loss, damage, or expense (including but not limited to litigation costs, attorney fees, and actually incurred losses from legal or administrative proceedings), the user shall bear corresponding liability for compensation.

XI. Disclaimer for Advertising Information
1. In the course of providing services, we may display commercial advertisements or other promotional ads within the app, mini programs, or related websites. If a user has a dispute or litigation with an advertiser placing such ads, we bear no liability provided we have exercised reasonable due diligence in advance.
2. We may also send users our game newsletters or related marketing information from time to time via email, SMS, or similar means, as part of the services we provide; if a user does not wish to receive such information, they may unsubscribe per the relevant opt-out rules.

XII. Force Majeure
Under no circumstances shall we be liable for delay or failure to perform, or incomplete performance, due to causes beyond our reasonable control, including but not limited to unforeseen circumstances such as natural disasters, war, terrorism, riots, embargoes, actions of administrative or military authorities, fire, flood, accidents, strikes, or errors, faults, or shortages of transportation, fuel, labor, materials, or computer software/hardware.

XIII. Applicable Law
1. If any clause of these terms of service is found partially or wholly invalid, this does not affect the validity of the other clauses.
2. Any dispute arising between the user and us under this Agreement shall first be resolved through friendly negotiation; if negotiation fails, the user hereby agrees to submit all related disputes to the jurisdiction of the People's Court of Changping District, Beijing.
3. For matters not covered herein, we have the right to agree upon them via supplementary agreement or other means, which shall be publicized in a reasonable manner and shall have the same effect as this Agreement. If a user does not agree to a supplementary agreement on an uncovered matter, they may voluntarily cancel or stop using our products and services; continued use is deemed agreement to the foregoing.
